## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`

## Review Gates

- [ ] Spec exists
- [ ] Acceptance criteria exists
- [ ] Domain behavior tested
- [ ] UI loading/error/empty states considered
- [ ] i18n strings added
- [ ] Accessibility considered
- [ ] No unnecessary scope creep
